user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee class, so that employees can be grouped by class type, payroll frequency and wage type
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Classification screen; When I click Add new employee class and provide class, acronym, class type, payroll frequency and wage type; Then the class is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter employee classes by Active or Inactive, so that I can focus on currently used classifications
acceptance_criteria: Given active and inactive classes exist; When I select Active or Inactive and click Display; Then only classes with that status are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view each class's payroll frequency and wage type, so that payroll is processed correctly for each group
acceptance_criteria: Given employee classes exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Employee class, acronym, class type, payroll frequency and wage type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an employee class, so that I can correct its payroll frequency or wage type
acceptance_criteria: Given a class is listed with an edit task; When I open it and change details; Then the updated class is saved
